title: Neocuatrecasia lobata

intro: Neocuatrecasia lobata is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, due to its reported anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Neocuatrecasia lobata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
